title: Investment Banking Intern
description:
About the job

Company Description

Founded in 2000, Huntington Advisory is an independent advisory firm specialising in M&A, capital raising, and strategic value creation across the financial services sector, with particular depth in insurance and reinsurance. The firm advises corporates, founders, and financial sponsors on complex, cross-border transactions, leveraging deep sector expertise, proprietary insights, and disciplined execution.

Additional information is available at huntingtonadvisory.com.

Role Description

The Strategic Advisory Intern will work closely with senior team members across live transactions and strategic assignments. The role offers hands-on exposure to M&A advisory, financial analysis, and FIG-sector strategy within a lean, high-performance environment. High-performing interns who are in their final years may be considered for longer-term or conversion opportunities.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct industry, market, and company research to support origination, strategic analysis, and transaction execution.
  • Support the preparation of client materials, including pitch decks, teasers, company profiles, and internal briefing documents.
  • Assist with financial analysis and valuation work, including DCFs, trading comparables, precedent transactions, and scenario analysis.
  • Support due diligence by reviewing financial statements, operating data, and transaction materials, and summarising key findings.
  • Provide general analytical and execution support across ongoing strategic and M&A assignments.

Qualifications

  • Education: Undergraduate or postgraduate students in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Mathematics, Actuarial Science, Physics, or related analytical disciplines. Students from all academic years are welcome to apply.
  • Analytical Skills: Strong quantitative ability, sound judgement, and high attention to detail.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with valuation and accounting concepts is an advantage.
  • Sector Interest: Strong interest in M&A, corporate finance, and financial services (insurance / reinsurance exposure is a plus but not required).
  • Professional Attributes: Highly motivated, intellectually curious, reliable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, lean team environment.
  • Experience: Prior internship experience in finance, consulting, or strategy is helpful but not required.


Availability & Commitment

  • Applicants should clearly state their availability (start date, duration, and weekly commitment) in their CV.
  • Minimum commitment: 6 months preferred (up to 12 months strongly encouraged).
  • Part-time arrangements are permitted, subject to availability and team requirements.

postedCompany.description:
At Huntington Search Partners, we believe that people are the heart of every successful business. With over two decades of experience, we specialize in connecting exceptional talent with visionary companies across industries like insurance and reinsurance and power and energy. Our mission is simple: to help organizations grow by unlocking the true potential of their workforce.

Unlike typical recruitment firms, we take time to understand the unique culture, goals, and challenges of each client, ensuring the people we find aren’t just qualified but truly the right fit. This thoughtful approach means we help build teams that thrive, innovate, and drive long-term success.

Headquartered in Singapore and serving the Asia Pacific and Europe regions, we blend deep industry knowledge with a personalized touch. Our consultants bring real-world insights and a passion for people, guiding clients through complex talent environments with transparency and integrity. By focusing on experience and expertise, we ensure every hire adds measurable value.

We also pride ourselves on fostering genuine relationships. For candidates, we offer guidance that goes beyond a job placement—supporting career growth and aspirations. For clients, we act as trusted partners invested in their business outcomes. This mutual respect and dedication set us apart.

In a fast-changing world, talent remains the most precious resource. Huntington Search Partners is committed to putting people first, delivering strategic human capital solutions designed to propel businesses forward. Whether scaling new teams or reshaping existing ones, our proven approach helps organizations succeed by combining the right people, with the right mindset, at the right time.
postedCompany.name: HUNTINGTON SEARCH PARTNERS PTE. LTD.
